title: DD One on One with Rei Ayanami 2009
display_title: DD One on One with Rei Ayanami 2009
wikitext:
[]: DD One on One with Rei Ayanami (2009)             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:51 am http://www.dd-magazine.net/200905/01.html (moonspeak) I suppose anyone should step onto the plate and translate it, as it's in a e-zine form.

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Sat Dec 04, 2010 5:04 pm Very quick summary/translation ^^ 1. Please introduce yourself. Ayanami... Rei. 2. [How do you feel about returning to Eva after 14 years?] There are no problems. 3. [Please tell us what you do.] I am Unit-00's pilot. 4. What is your image of chief director Anno? .... I don't know. 5. [How was the atmosphere working with your co-stars?] There were no problems. 6. [What is your plug suit made out of?] I don't know. I feel fine wearing it. 7. [In the first film you were often wearing bandages. Up until now how many meters of bandages have you used?] ... probably, a lot. 8. [In the previous series your favorite food was "garlic ramen with no pork." Aside from that, what do you like to eat?] Nothing in particular. 9. [Finally, "Evangelion:Break" will soon be released, please give our readers some advice for viewing it.] I think it's best to know nothing in advance. Please judge it with your own eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Dec 04, 2010 5:09 pm 1731298478 wrote: I think it's best to know nothing in advance. Please judge it with your own eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Dec 04, 2010 5:15 pm Gotta love Rei. Her straightfoward thinking of life speaks the truth.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sun Dec 05, 2010 2:12 am Lovely, shows how she thinks and speaks. +10 for this one, and thanks 17. :) EDIT: Actually there are two 17s: one starting with both digits, and another ending with both digits.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sun Dec 05, 2010 2:42 am soul.assassin wrote: Lovely, shows how she thinks and speaks. +10 for this one, and thanks 17. :)

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Dec 05, 2010 2:50 am Thanks for the translation, 1731298478.

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Sun Dec 05, 2010 4:15 am 1731298478 wrote: 4. What is your image of chief director Anno? .... I don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Dec 05, 2010 7:28 am I wonder who wrote that. Megumi or some random staff member? I doubt it was Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:33 am don't you love Rei's talkativeness? btw what is "evangelion: break"?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Dec 05, 2010 1:42 pm Fireball wrote: don't you love Rei's talkativeness? btw what is "evangelion: break"?

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Sun Dec 05, 2010 1:52 pm As opposed to Eva itself, in which there is not one single "shit gets real" moment, but rather a steady stream of increasing reality, starting at 100% real in episode 1 and by now somewhere near 5,600% real.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Dec 05, 2010 1:54 pm Who writes this stuff for Rei anyway? Oh and: Break or Ha/破 is the second rebuild movie, which can also be translated into Division instead of Break. Full Japanese movie title: エヴアンゲリオン　新劇場版:破 Evangerion Shin Gekijou Ban:Ha Evangelion New Movie Version:Break/Division

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sun Dec 05, 2010 6:33 pm i am horribly slow today. i am actually fully aware of ha . only read 17's translation and thought it's another side story kind of thing -_- anyway, thanks for clearing it up, guys.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Dec 05, 2010 6:43 pm Thanks 1731298478 for the translation (and thanks to soul.assassin for noticing this page); it'd be nice to know if it's been written by Megumi or some random staff member but I suppose that it's not specified in that page.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Dec 06, 2010 12:21 pm Sounds like Rei visited EGF and told us how we should be watching her movies. Neat find. Thanks, 17+ and soul.assasin!

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Dec 13, 2010 5:34 pm Cute little clueless Rei. I guess this is pretty much what she would actually answer. *Imagines Asuka dramatizing the story of her life, Shinji stuttering something barely audible and Mari randomly remarking on the interviewer's scent* Of course, Reiso seems to luv Shinji's Miso soup, but she was probably told not to spoil anything XD

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Thu Dec 16, 2010 1:39 am It seems Rei is basically saying, "I don't know and I don't care."

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Dec 21, 2010 6:33 am After seeing "DD" and "Rei Ayanami" joined in the thread title, the OP profoundly disappointed me...
